meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve stuck with basic apps (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: Master User Onboarding: A Student Guide for AI Builders
content.seo_description: Break past basic app limitations. Learn to implement professional user onboarding flows using Antigravity and Claude Code in this step-by-step guide.
content.answer_block: To move beyond basic apps, you must master user onboarding. It transforms a functional script into a professional product. By implementing guided tours, progressive data collection, and interactive tooltips using Antigravity and Claude Code, you bridge the gap between simple code and a high-retention, market-ready SaaS application.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks coding logic, debugging API calls, and refining your UI, yet your app feels empty the moment a user signs up. The 'empty state' syndrome is the graveyard of student projects. It’s the silent gap where users lose interest because they don't know what to do next.

Professional software isn't just code; it’s an experience. By mastering user onboarding, you shift from being a 'coder' to a 'product engineer.' This guide will show you how to architect a seamless first-time experience that turns visitors into power users, giving you the competitive edge needed to land your first job or launch your first startup.

steps.title: Architect the User Journey
steps.description: Define the 'Aha!' moment. Before coding, map out the 3 clicks required to show the user the core value of your application.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a Lead Product Designer. Create a user flow diagram for a SaaS onboarding sequence that prioritizes the 'Aha!' moment within the first 60 seconds of interaction.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Generate a JSON schema for a step-by-step onboarding state machine'

steps.title: Implement Progressive Profiling
steps.description: Don't overwhelm users with forms. Collect data in small, contextual chunks as they engage with your app features.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a React component for a multi-step onboarding modal that saves state to local storage and validates input fields progressively.

steps.title: Create Interactive Tooltips
steps.description: Use tooltips to guide users through complex UI elements without cluttering the screen.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a reusable Tooltip component using Framer Motion that triggers based on a specific user action sequence.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit --file './components/Tooltip.tsx' --instruction 'Add Framer Motion entrance animations'

steps.title: Integrate Contextual Empty States
steps.description: Replace empty lists with actionable 'Get Started' buttons to prevent user drop-off.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a high-converting empty state component that suggests the user's first action using a clear call-to-action button.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Refactor all dashboard empty states to include call-to-action components'

steps.title: Final QA and Flow Testing
steps.description: Simulate the user experience to ensure no dead ends exist in the onboarding flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Playwright test suite to simulate a new user walking through the entire onboarding flow from landing to the dashboard.

pro_tips: Never force a sign-up before providing value; let users explore a 'guest mode' first.
Use micro-copy that speaks to the user's current goal, not just technical instructions.
Track onboarding drop-off points with analytics to identify which step is confusing users.
Always provide a 'Skip' button; power users will appreciate the freedom to explore at their own pace.
Gamify the setup process by showing a progress bar to trigger the Zeigarnik effect.
resources: UX Collective Onboarding Best Practices: https://uxdesign.cc
content.next_steps: Now that your onboarding is live, deploy your app to Vercel or Netlify and share the link in our Discord to get feedback from senior engineers.
content.conversion_block: Your portfolio is only as strong as the user experience you provide. By implementing these onboarding strategies, you separate your work from thousands of other student projects. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
